title: AN ACT TO REPEAL REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED NINETY-EIGHT.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1595 / 56 OG No. 38, 5851 (September 19, 1960)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2637, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO REPEAL REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED NINETY-EIGHT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Republic Act Numbered One thousand seven hundred ninety-eight is repealed.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
